commit_message:
docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-415

drift_observations.description: writeStateAtomic body-stripping behavior, BootstrapPacket.open_children shape change, and bootstrap-context-size telemetry event not documented
Key behaviors missing: body stripping, BootstrapPacket.open_children shape, bootstrap-context-size event

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added three editing rules: writeStateAtomic body-stripping for non-next children with clusters.json recovery path; BootstrapPacket.open_children shape as {next_child, remaining_count}; bootstrap-context-size JSONL event before each dispatch.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Added three key behaviors: bootstrap-context-size telemetry event; writeStateAtomic body-slimming with clusters.json recovery; BootstrapPacket.open_children as {next_child, remaining_count}.

docs_archived.reason: One-time pre-implementation analysis; implementation cluster POL-415 now complete. Kept in place.

evidence_summary: Cluster POL-415 completed three token-burn reduction children. POL-416 added body-stripping in writeStateAtomic for non-next children. POL-417 changed BootstrapPacket.open_children from a full array to {next_child, remaining_count}. POL-418 added bootstrap-context-size JSONL telemetry before each dispatch. Both src/loop/POLARIS.md and src/loop/SUMMARY.md were updated to document these behavioral changes. The raw analysis doc pol-414 was classified as a completed one-time analysis and left in place. No docs were promoted to specs/active. No cognition notes were pending. No links were broken by the edits. Commit 5284687 contains only the two documentation files.
